creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hmm, there are numerous other questions about this port

1) Comment starts with an indefinite article (would have been caught by portlint)
2) MAN6 defined (already mentioned)
3) Use of <bsd.port.pre.mk> and <bsd.port.post.mk> - I see no reason to have <pre> and <post>
4) The pkg-plist contains no installed files
5) The pack-plist changes ownership without using @owner pkg-plist keyword (see porters handbook)
6) The pkg-plist deletes a directory it does not install (CARDS) 

Either this port only installs empty directories and a single man page, or it has a bad pkg-plist.

There are too many questions - can you take it back, address each one, and provide both portlint and "make check-orphans" and maybe "make stage-qa", then resubmit? 

Thanks
